title: Anker Nano Power Bank, Ultra-Slim 5,000mAh Magnetic Wireless Charging Battery, Qi2 Certified 15W Max MagSafe-Compatible Portable Charger, Ergonomic Design, for iPhone Air/17/16 Series
bullets: Ultra-Slim 0.3-Inch Design: Experience 5,000mAh of dependable charging in a 0.3-inch slim magnetic power bank that slips effortlessly into your pocket.
Qi2 Certified Fast Charging: 15W Max MagSafe-compatible fast charging powers your iPhone 16 Pro to 25% in just 42 minutes.
20W Max USB-C Charging: Also provides up to 20W of power out through its USB-C port for faster wired charging when you need maximum speed.
Advanced Cooling System: With graphene cooling, dual NTC chips, and smart charging adjustments, stays below 104°F — 14 degrees cooler than the industry standard.
What You Get: Anker Nano Power Bank (5K, MagGo, Slim), USB-C to USB-C charging cable, welcome guide, 24-month warranty, and friendly customer service.

clr.item_name: Anker Nano Power Bank, Ultra-Slim 5,000mAh Magnetic Wireless Charging Battery, Qi2 Certified 15W Max MagSafe-Compatible Portable Charger, Ergonomic Design, for iPhone Air/17/16 Series
clr.product_description: The Anker Nano Power Bank (5K, MagGo, Slim) delivers 5,000mAh of portable power in an ultra-slim 0.34-inch / 8.6mm profile. Qi2-certified 15W MagSafe-compatible wireless charging plus 20W USB-C wired output. Graphene cooling with dual NTC temperature sensors keeps the device below 104°F during charging. Strong N52 magnets ensure secure MagSafe attachment. Compatible with iPhone 12/13/14/15/16 series and MagSafe cases.
clr.compatible_devices: iPhone 16 Pro, iPhone 16, iPhone 15, iPhone 14, iPhone 13, iPhone 12, AirPods Pro 2
clr.special_features: Qi2 Certified, MagSafe Compatible, Graphene Cooling, Ultra-Slim 0.34 inch

btg.node_path: Cell Phones & Accessories > Accessories > Chargers & Power Adapters > Portable Power Banks

keywords: ultra thin power bank for iphone 16

charging_speed: What wattage is the wireless charging?
compatibility: Does it work through a case?
durability: How long does the battery last?
capacity: How many times can it charge my phone?

reviews.text: Incredibly thin — barely adds any bulk to my iPhone 16 Pro. Love how it snaps on with strong magnets.
Does it work through a case? I have a thick OtterBox and wondering if the magnets are strong enough.
Is this allowed on airplanes? I travel weekly and need TSA-approved chargers.
Only charges my iPhone 16 Pro to about 70-75%. Expected more from 5000mAh. The conversion efficiency seems low.
Gets warm during wireless charging but never hot. The graphene cooling actually works — stays comfortable in hand.
The 15W wireless charging is noticeably faster than my old MagSafe battery. Qi2 certification makes a real difference.
USB-C port stopped working after 2 months. Wireless charging still works but disappointing for the price.
How fast does this charge my iPhone 15? Looking for something that won't take forever.
Best MagSafe battery I've owned. The slim profile means I can use it while holding my phone normally. No more brick-on-the-back feeling.
Misleading — says 5000mAh but you only get about 3000mAh usable due to wireless efficiency loss. Should be clearer about this.
Doesn't work with my iPhone 12 mini. Wish the listing was clearer about compatibility.
The LED indicators are too dim in sunlight. Hard to tell how much charge is left when outdoors.

competitor_qas.question: Can I use this while wirelessly charging my phone?
competitor_qas.answer: Yes, you can use your phone normally while the power bank is attached and charging wirelessly.

competitor_qas.question: Does it work with MagSafe cases?
competitor_qas.answer: Yes, it's compatible with official MagSafe cases and most third-party MagSafe-compatible cases.

competitor_qas.question: Can I charge the power bank and my phone at the same time?
competitor_qas.answer: Yes, it supports pass-through charging — plug USB-C into the power bank and it charges both simultaneously.

modules.content: Q: Is it airplane safe? A: Yes, 18.5Wh is well under the 100Wh FAA limit. Q: Does it work with cases? A: Yes, compatible with MagSafe cases. Q: How fast is wireless charging? A: 15W Qi2 — iPhone 16 Pro to 25% in 42 min.

videos.title: Stop settling for bulky MagSafe batteries — meet the Anker Nano Power Bank
videos.description: Tired of thick, heavy battery packs ruining your phone grip? The ultra-slim 0.34-inch Anker Nano finally solves the bulk problem. 15W Qi2 charging, graphene cooling, and it barely adds any weight. Enjoy effortless portable power.
